## Notes
- Project is an internal PR/comms tool with a single primary user (Arabic-preferring analyst), so PRICING_STRATEGY, MARKETING_STRATEGY, RISK_ASSESSMENT, and CUSTOMER_VALIDATION were intentionally not part of the idea-forge research set.
- CONSTRAINT_VALIDATION verdict is **CONDITIONAL PASS** — the 5 conditions are tracked in `known-issues.md` as KI-001 through KI-005 and are addressed as implementation steps in Phase 0.
- Timeline is tight: ~600h available vs. ~520h needed (~15% headroom, C-10 WARNING). Phase 6 items (Sentry, Axiom, stats, backup) are deferred past the MVP cut-line.
